name: Mesh Remesher
author: Modly
description: Regularizes mesh topology with isotropic remeshing. Quad mode is quad-dominant cleanup, not character retopology.

params_schema.label: Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Triangle produces a clean uniform triangulation. Quad-Dominant attempts more regular polygon flow for cleanup, but it is not character-oriented retopology. None passes the mesh through unchanged.

params_schema.label: Target Edge Length
params_schema.tooltip: Target edge length in world units. Set to 0 for automatic (uses average edge length of the input mesh).
